summary: Comprehensive testing of warranty workflow system. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Ticketing Setup page shows all 3 warranty help topics (AMC Support, Non-Warranty Repair, Warranty Claim OEM), Settings page shows all team phone/email configs, Ticket detail page shows OEM Tracking panel with edit capability, Device Coverage badge showing warranty type, and Notification panel with WhatsApp + Email buttons for Backend/Billing/Parts/Quote teams.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ticketing/workflows returns oem-warranty, amc-support, non-warranty workflows
Backend: OEM Warranty workflow has 8 stages (New, Verified Warranty, Escalated to OEM, OEM Case Logged, OEM Engineer Dispatched, OEM Resolution, Closed, Cancelled)
Backend: AMC workflow has 10 stages (New, Assigned, Scheduled, In Progress, Diagnosed, Awaiting Parts, Parts Received, Fixed On-Site, Resolved, Cancelled)

Backend: Non-Warranty workflow has 12 stages (New, Assigned, Diagnosed, Quotation Sent, Customer Approved, Customer Rejected, Parts Ordered, In Progress, Fixed On-Site, Billing Pending, Resolved, Cancelled)
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/device-warranty-check/{device_id} returns warranty_type, suggested_workflow_id, suggested_help_topic_id
Backend: Device warranty check returns correct response structure (device_id, warranty_type, warranty_type_label, managed_by, details)
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets creates ticket with device_warranty_type auto-detected
Backend: PUT /api/ticketing/tickets/{id} saves OEM tracking fields (oem_case_number, oem_engineer_name, oem_engineer_phone, oem_brand_reference, oem_status, oem_notes)
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/help-topics returns warranty help topics (AMC Support, Non-Warranty Repair, Warranty Claim OEM)
Frontend: Ticketing Setup page shows 'AMC Support' help topic
Frontend: Ticketing Setup page shows 'Non-Warranty Repair' help topic
Frontend: Ticketing Setup page shows 'Warranty Claim (OEM)' help topic
Frontend: Settings page shows data-testid='settings-page'
Frontend: Settings page shows billing-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings page shows parts-order-phone input field
Frontend: Settings page shows quote-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings page shows backend-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings page shows Billing Team section with WhatsApp and Email configs
Frontend: Settings page shows Parts Order Team section
Frontend: Settings page shows Quotation Team section
Frontend: Ticket detail page shows OEM Tracking panel with data-testid='oem-tracking-panel'
Frontend: OEM Tracking panel shows Case #, Engineer, Phone, Brand Ref, OEM Status fields
Frontend: OEM Tracking panel has edit button for updating OEM details
Frontend: Ticket detail page shows 'Device Coverage' section with warranty type badge
Frontend: Device Coverage shows 'Brand Warranty / ADP - Managed by OEM'
Frontend: Notification panel shows data-testid='notification-panel'
Frontend: Notification panel shows Backend Team, Billing Team, Parts Team, Quote Team options
Frontend: Each notification option has WA and Email badges
Frontend: Workflow progress bar shows AMC Support Workflow stages

topics: AMC Support - Device under Annual Maintenance Contract. Managed by MSP
Non-Warranty Repair - Device out of warranty. Customer pays for parts and service
Warranty Claim (OEM) - Device under brand warranty or ADP plan. Managed by OEM

oem_tracking_fields.ui_panel: OEM Tracking panel with edit capability

seed_data_creation: Warranty workflows and help topics were seeded via POST /api/ticketing/seed-warranty-workflows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Warranty workflow system fully tested and working. 3 workflows (oem-warranty, amc-support, non-warranty) with correct stages. Device warranty check auto-detects warranty type based on devices collection warranty_end_date and amc_contracts. OEM tracking fields can be saved via PUT /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}. Ticketing Setup page at /admin/ticketing-config shows all help topics under Help Topics tab. Ticket detail page shows OEM Tracking panel for tickets with device_warranty_type='oem_warranty'. Settings page at /admin/settings has all team phone/email config fields.
